SELECT toInt16OrZero(input_string) AS converted_value FROM test_table WHERE converted_value = 0;
SELECT input_string, toInt16OrZero(input_string) AS converted_value FROM test_table WHERE input_string LIKE '%a%';
SELECT toInt16OrZero(sub.result) FROM (SELECT input_string FROM test_table WHERE input_string NOT LIKE '0%') AS sub;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table GROUP BY toInt16OrZero(input_string) HAVING converted_value > 0;
SELECT input_string, CASE WHEN toInt16OrZero(input_string) = 0 THEN 'Invalid' ELSE 'Valid' END AS status FROM test_table;
